name: G-13 eslint compliance: --emit-eslint-config refuses to emit (exit 2) when any rule fails the E-8 metadata check
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-eslint-compliance.sh" "$PWD/file.yaml" --emit-eslint-config 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'is required' err.txt && grep -qv '"rules":' err.txt && echo refused 1>&2
